title: ERROR 1712 (HY000): Index PRIMARY is corrupted
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE e2 (x Int32 NOT NULL, y String, z Date, w Float64 DEFAULT 0.0, PRIMARY KEY (x));
INSERT INTO e2 (x, y, z) VALUES (1, 'test', '2023-01-01');
ALTER TABLE e2 ADD COLUMN v DateTime DEFAULT now();
UPDATE e2 SET y = NULL WHERE x = 1;
SELECT * FROM e2 WHERE w > 0.0 OR z IS NULL;
key_bug_features: alter table e1 add primary key (a)
